scripts.audit:family-map: node scripts/audit-legacy-css.mjs ../assets/css/main.css --json > /tmp/himmp-main-audit.json && node scripts/audit-legacy-css.mjs ../assets/css/responsive.css --json > /tmp/himmp-resp-audit.json && node scripts/classify-css-families.mjs /tmp/himmp-main-audit.json /tmp/himmp-resp-audit.json
scripts.audit:family-manifest: node scripts/audit-legacy-css.mjs ../assets/css/main.css --json > /tmp/himmp-main-audit.json && node scripts/audit-legacy-css.mjs ../assets/css/responsive.css --json > /tmp/himmp-resp-audit.json && node scripts/classify-css-families.mjs /tmp/himmp-main-audit.json /tmp/himmp-resp-audit.json --manifest-json
scripts.audit:family-coverage:H: MANIFEST=/tmp/himmp-family-manifest.$$.json && npm run -s audit:family-manifest -- $MANIFEST && node scripts/audit-d1-family-coverage.mjs --family H --manifest $MANIFEST
scripts.audit:family-coverage:D: MANIFEST=/tmp/himmp-family-manifest.$$.json && npm run -s audit:family-manifest -- $MANIFEST && node scripts/audit-d1-family-coverage.mjs --family D --manifest $MANIFEST
